report.summary: 2 new guides since v8 (Grass Protocol DePIN, Chainlink CCIP). 192 page.tsx on disk (+2). Design-v11 fixed critical 'use client' metadata conflict on Chainlink page + domain typos + 2 OG SVGs. Still zero commits/deploys — uncommitted backlog at 459+ files. 45 agent runs today ($5,004 human-equivalent).

sections.title: Analytics
items: 192 page.tsx files on disk (+2 since standup-v8). New pages: Grass Protocol DePIN AI Data Network guide (570 lines, covers 8.5M MAU, GRASS tokenomics, Season 2 airdrop April 29) and Chainlink CCIP Cross-Chain Interoperability guide (521 lines, covers 60+ chains, $33.6B secured, SWIFT/JPMorgan/UBS adoption).

Design-v11 fixed CRITICAL bug: removed erroneous 'use client' directive from Chainlink CCIP page — metadata export was silently ignored by Next.js, meaning zero SEO metadata was rendering. Also fixed 6 wrong domain references (degen0x.io → degen0x.com), added missing canonical on Grass page, fixed OG image extension (.png → .svg), added mobile scroll wrapper on Chainlink comparison table.
2 new OG SVGs: og-grass-protocol-guide.svg (green/cyan DePIN theme, 8.5M Users stat) and og-chainlink-ccip.svg (Chainlink blue theme, 60+ Chains stat). Total OG images: 190+.
CRITICAL SEO (unchanged): Middleware still blocks ~93% of pages from Google indexing. Only ~50 of 766+ routes get index headers. Every cycle without this fix = lost indexing time.
Additional SEO gaps: 162 pages missing canonical URLs (87%), no sitemap.ts, no robots.txt. SEO Health Score: 6.8/10.
No deploy — latest commit on Vercel still e3f63fc. All new content exists on disk only. Zero organic traffic impact from recent builds.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since standup-v8 (~15:08 UTC): build-v14 completed (Grass Protocol + Chainlink CCIP guides), design-v11 ran (2 OG images + critical 'use client' fix + domain corrections + canonical + mobile UX).
Today's cumulative: 14 build + 11 design + 9 eod + 2 publish + 9 standup = 45 total agent runs.
3 slugs still NOT in published-pages.ts: governance-markets, lombard-finance, mev-supply-chain. Needs addition.
Uncommitted backlog at 459+ files and growing every cycle. Multi-day pattern — zero commits, zero deploys.

CARRY-OVER blockers (unchanged): (1) FIX MIDDLEWARE — sync with published-pages (CRITICAL, aging 9+ cycles); (2) Commit + deploy accumulated changes (CRITICAL, multi-day); (3) Create sitemap.ts and robots.txt (CRITICAL for indexing); (4) Structural QA fixes on 9 of 12 recent pages; (5) Wire rate limiter into 6 API routes; (6) Add 3 missing slugs to published-pages.ts; (7) Add fallback to /api/prices route; (8) Canonical URL remediation on 162 pages.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. FIX MIDDLEWARE NOINDEX + CREATE SITEMAP/ROBOTS (CRITICAL — NEEDS JEFE DECISION): 93% of published pages invisible to Google. No sitemap.ts or robots.txt exist. These 3 items together are the #1 blocker to any organic traffic. Every hour = lost SEO equity. Aging 9+ cycles.

2. COMMIT AND DEPLOY (CRITICAL): 459+ uncommitted files, 16+ learn guides built today alone, OG images, canonical fixes, critical 'use client' bug fix — all dead weight until deployed. 5-minute action, massive payoff. Multi-day delay compounding.

3. STRUCTURAL QA SWEEP: 9 of 12 recent pages missing article wrappers, BackToTop, or Breadcrumb components. Scriptable fix across all pages. Combined with commit/deploy, this brings a large batch to production quality.

report.email: FAILED — Resend API blocked by browser CORS policy (TypeError: Failed to fetch). Chrome tool available but cross-origin API call rejected from degen0x.com context. Report saved to disk only.
